results.content: Customers consistently praise the exceptional quality of backdrops and materials, some customers experienced product accuracy issues, in videos. But my

results.title: Backdrop Discussion
results.content:
- Has anyone here bought a oliphant studios backdrop or painted your own backdrop? I've looked into painting one myself, but the cost, adds up to around 200 plus and I most probably won't get the same texture as oliphant studios ones. Plus from what I heard its about $1k if you buy one. It seems that people aren't allowed to resell their backdrops? I don't seem them anywhere on the used market.
- It doesn't matter how wrinkled it is, once you stretch it out and clamp it tight it is never wrinkled.
- I've got three rolls of seamless hung up, and I use cookies to put a little texture on them if I want it [...] ## Content [...] # Backdrop Discussion
